profile.description_en: PhD student specializing in BioMEMS, multimodal biosensors, engineered cardiac tissue monitoring, and drug cardiotoxicity evaluation. Experienced in MEMS device design, microfabrication, cell and tissue culture, sensing system integration, and multimodal biosignal analysis. My research focuses on integrating strain sensors, microelectrode arrays, and 3D bioelectronic platforms for synchronized and quantitative assessment of cardiac tissue function.
profile.description_zh: 博士研究生，研究方向聚焦于 BioMEMS、多模态生物传感器、工程化心脏组织监测和药物心脏毒性评价。具备 MEMS 器件设计、微纳加工、细胞与组织培养、传感系统搭建和多模态生物信号分析经验。研究工作围绕应变传感器、微电极阵列和 3D 生物电子平台展开，目标是实现心肌组织机械收缩与电活动的同步、长期和定量检测。

research_experience.description_en: Designed and developed BioMEMS-based multimodal sensing platforms for engineered cardiac tissues.
research_experience.description_zh: 面向工程化心脏组织设计并开发基于 BioMEMS 的多模态传感平台。

research_experience.description_en: Integrated strain sensors and microelectrode arrays to monitor mechanical contraction and electrical activity in cardiac tissue models.
research_experience.description_zh: 集成应变传感器与微电极阵列，实现心肌组织机械收缩与电活动的同步监测。

research_experience.description_en: Established 3D engineered heart tissue culture and drug stimulation workflows for cardiotoxicity screening and disease modeling.
research_experience.description_zh: 建立 3D 工程化心脏组织培养与药物刺激流程，用于药物心脏毒性筛选和疾病模型研究。

research_experience.description_en: Developed MATLAB / Python-based analysis workflows for extracting contraction amplitude, beating frequency, field potential features, and electromechanical coupling parameters.
research_experience.description_zh: 开发 MATLAB / Python 信号分析流程，用于提取收缩幅值、搏动频率、场电位特征和机电耦合参数。

research_experience.description_en: Built experimental measurement systems involving low-noise signal acquisition, microscopy, sensor calibration, and hardware integration.
research_experience.description_zh: 搭建包含低噪声信号采集、显微成像、传感器标定和硬件集成在内的实验测量系统。

selected_projects.title_en: Bioinspired Hypoxic Cardiac Model and Electromechanical Evaluation Platform
selected_projects.title_zh: 仿生心脏缺氧模型与机电评估平台
selected_projects.description_en: Developed an in vitro cardiac hypoxia model combined with multimodal electromechanical readouts. | Integrated mechanical contraction sensing and electrical activity recording for functional assessment of engineered cardiac tissues. | Applied the platform to evaluate cardiac tissue response under disease-relevant microenvironmental conditions.
selected_projects.description_zh: 开发结合多模态机电读出的体外心脏缺氧模型。 | 集成机械收缩检测与电活动记录，用于工程化心脏组织功能评估。 | 用于疾病相关微环境下心脏组织响应的定量分析。
selected_projects.notes: EN metadata: 2026.03-Present | MNTL | Role: Researcher and platform developer; ZH metadata: 2026.03-至今 | MNTL | 角色：研究者与平台开发者

selected_projects.title_en: High-Throughput Drug Toxicity Screening Platform Based on 3D Cardiac Tissues
selected_projects.title_zh: 基于 3D 心脏组织的高通量药物毒理筛选平台
selected_projects.description_en: Designed and optimized a 3D cardiac tissue-based sensing platform for drug cardiotoxicity evaluation. | Integrated strain-based mechanical sensing and electrophysiological readouts. | Supported long-term monitoring and multiparametric analysis of drug-induced functional responses.
selected_projects.description_zh: 设计并优化面向药物心脏毒性评价的 3D 心脏组织传感平台。 | 整合基于应变的机械读出与电生理读出。 | 支持药物诱导功能响应的长期监测和多参数分析。
selected_projects.notes: EN metadata: 2024.03-2026.03 | MNTL | Role: Researcher and system integrator; ZH metadata: 2024.03-2026.03 | MNTL | 角色：研究者与系统集成者

selected_projects.title_en: Graphene-Conductive Microenvironment for Cardiomyocyte Maturation and Electrophysiological Communication
selected_projects.title_zh: 石墨烯导电微环境对心肌细胞电生理通讯与成熟的调控机制
selected_projects.description_en: Investigated conductive microenvironment effects on cardiomyocyte maturation and intercellular communication. | Developed graphene/SU-8-based platforms for cardiac tissue functional enhancement. | Contributed to journal publication and conference outputs.
selected_projects.description_zh: 研究导电微环境对心肌细胞成熟和细胞间通讯的影响。 | 开发基于 graphene / SU-8 的平台用于提升组织功能表现。 | 支撑期刊论文与国际会议成果输出。
selected_projects.notes: EN metadata: 2022.09-2024.03 | MNTL | Role: Platform developer and experimental researcher; ZH metadata: 2022.09-2024.03 | MNTL | 角色：平台开发者与实验研究者
